title: JavaFX Developer Report (JSON)
description: Machine-readable report schema for javafx-developer. Covers both generation mode (initial project scaffolding) and fix consumption mode (applying fix handoffs from reviewer/runner/tester). Used by the orchestrator for loop state updates and CI/CD integration.

report_type.description: Always 'developer' to distinguish from review, verification, and test reports

developer_version.description: Developer skill version — must match SKILL.md metadata.version

mode.description: generating = initial code generation (Steps 1-6); fix_consumption = applying fix handoffs (Step 5.5)

generation_result.description: Present only when mode is 'generating'. Describes the generated project artifacts.

architecture_pattern.description: Architecture pattern used for code generation

controllers.description: List of generated Controller class paths

view_models.description: List of generated ViewModel class paths (empty if MVC pattern)

models.description: List of generated Model/Entity class paths

fxml_files.description: List of generated FXML file paths

css_files.description: List of generated CSS file paths

services.description: List of generated Service class paths

daos.description: List of generated DAO/Repository class paths

handoffs_consumed.description: List of handoff files consumed during generation (architecture-handoff.json, design-handoff.json, requirements-handoff.json)

failed_items.description: Names of failed quality checklist items

compile_result.description: Whether the generated project compiles successfully

fix_summary.description: Present only when mode is 'fix_consumption'. Aggregated results of fix handoff consumption.

fixes_applied.description: Count of fixes successfully applied (including relocated)

fixes_skipped.description: Count of fixes skipped (line drift, file not found, missing corrected_example)

fixes_rolled_back.description: Count of fixes rolled back due to compilation failure (batch-level)

fixes_failed.description: Count of fixes that failed to apply (distinct from skipped/rolled_back)

fixes.description: Per-fix status entries, sorted by fix_priority ascending

status.description: Fix application status. 'applied' variants indicate successful application possibly at a relocated position.

source.description: Which skill produced this fix handoff

note.description: Additional context (e.g., 'Line drift, found at line 32', 'Method moved to path/to/NewLocation.java')

ast_node_signature.description: AST-level anchor used for Level 4 matching. Null for non-Java files.

dedup_merged_from.description: If this fix superseded an overlapping fix from another source during merge, records the discarded source. Populated by the orchestrator (orchestrated mode) or by the developer (standalone mode) during dedup. Null if no dedup occurred or if this entry was consumed as-is from a pre-merged batch.

cross_impact_warnings.description: Cross-impact check results (Step 4). Warnings do not block fixes but are reported for reviewer/runner evaluation.

rollback_events.description: Rollback events if compilation failed after applying fixes. Empty if no rollback occurred.

rollback_verification.description: Whether post-rollback compilation passed (project restored to pre-fix state)

compile_result.description: Post-fix compilation result. 'Fail' triggers automatic rollback.

backup_dir.description: Path to .fix-backup/{timestamp}/ directory. Null if no backup was created.

conclusion.description: Overall conclusion. 'Pass' = all fixes applied and compilation passed; 'Pass with warnings' = some fixes skipped but project compiles; 'Fail' = rollback occurred or generation failed quality checks

next_action.description: Developer's recommended next action for the orchestrator. Note: this enum differs from reviewer/runner's loop_state.next_action because the developer expresses its own needs (e.g., 're_review' = developer asks for re-review), whereas reviewer/runner express the loop's state (e.g., 'fixing' = loop is in fixing phase)

warnings.description: List of warnings (skipped fixes, cross-impact issues, quality check failures)

loop_state.description: Loop state fields written by the developer to .loop-state.json

fix_handoffs.description: Per-handoff status markers for dashboard visualization
